requirement_topic.en: SANS 60335-2-40 Electrical Safety — Heat Pump Air Conditioners (230 V / 50 Hz; Load-Shedding)
requirement_topic.zh: SANS 60335-2-40电气安全——热泵空调器（230V/50Hz；停电轮供）
requirement_topic.zht: SANS 60335-2-40電氣安全——熱泵空調器（230V/50Hz；停電輪供）

summary.en: South Africa's compulsory safety standard for heat pump air conditioners is SANS 60335-2-40 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for electrical heat pumps, air-conditioners and dehumidifiers), which adopts IEC 60335-2-40. Conformance to SANS 60335-2-40 is required as part of the NRCS Letter of Authority (LOA) process under VC 8055. South Africa operates at 230 V / 50 Hz (single-phase) and 400 V / 50 Hz (three-phase). Products designed and rated for China's 220 V / 50 Hz grid must be verified for safe operation at 230 V (and the applicable ±10 % tolerance range, covering up to 253 V). South Africa's endemic load-shedding environment — frequent planned power outages and voltage fluctuation — means products should also be validated for repeated start-up and shut-down cycling and transient voltage stress conditions beyond steady-state safety compliance.
summary.zh: 南非热泵空调器强制安全标准为SANS 60335-2-40（家用及类似用途电器安全——电热泵、空调器和除湿机的特殊要求），等同采用IEC 60335-2-40。符合SANS 60335-2-40是在VC 8055下申请NRCS授权书（LOA）流程的必要条件。南非单相电网为230V/50Hz，三相电网为400V/50Hz。针对中国220V/50Hz电网设计和额定的产品须验证在230V（及适用的±10%容差范围，最高253V）下的安全运行。南非普遍存在停电轮供现象——计划性停电和电压波动频繁——意味着产品还应在稳态安全合规之外验证反复启停循环和瞬态电压应力工况。
summary.zht: 南非熱泵空調器強制安全標準為SANS 60335-2-40（家用及類似用途電器安全——電熱泵、空調器和除濕機的特殊要求），等同採用IEC 60335-2-40。符合SANS 60335-2-40是在VC 8055下申請NRCS授權書（LOA）流程的必要條件。南非單相電網為230V/50Hz，三相電網為400V/50Hz。針對中國220V/50Hz電網設計和額定的產品須驗證在230V（及適用的±10%容差範圍，最高253V）下的安全運行。南非普遍存在停電輪供現象——計劃性停電和電壓波動頻繁——意味著產品還應在穩態安全合規之外驗證反複啟停循環和瞬態電壓應力工況。

standards_or_laws: SANS 60335-2-40 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances: Particular requirements for electrical heat pumps, air-conditioners and dehumidifiers (adopts IEC 60335-2-40)
VC 8055 — Compulsory Specification for Household and Similar Electrical Appliances (NRCS)
National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications Act (Act 5 of 2008), South Africa

summary.en: China's domestic electrical safety standard for heat pumps and air conditioners is GB 4706.32 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for heat pumps, air-conditioners, and dehumidifiers), which is based on IEC 60335-2-40 but tested at Chinese grid conditions (220 V / 50 Hz). CCC certification under GB 4706.32 is mandatory for Chinese domestic market sales. CCC certificates are not accepted as equivalent conformity evidence by NRCS for the South African LOA, and GB 4706.32 test data at 220 V conditions are not automatically valid for SANS 60335-2-40 compliance at 230 V.
summary.zh: 中国热泵和空调器国内电气安全标准为GB 4706.32（家用及类似用途电器安全——热泵、空调器和除湿机的特殊要求），基于IEC 60335-2-40，但在中国电网条件（220V/50Hz）下测试。GB 4706.32下的CCC认证对中国国内市场销售为强制性。CCC证书不被NRCS接受为南非LOA的等同符合性证明，且GB 4706.32在220V条件下的测试数据不能自动作为SANS 60335-2-40在230V下合规的有效证据。
summary.zht: 中國熱泵和空調器國內電氣安全標準為GB 4706.32（家用及類似用途電器安全——熱泵、空調器和除濕機的特殊要求），基於IEC 60335-2-40，但在中國電網條件（220V/50Hz）下測試。GB 4706.32下的CCC認證對中國國內市場銷售為強制性。CCC證書不被NRCS接受為南非LOA的等同符合性證明，且GB 4706.32在220V條件下的測試數據不能自動作為SANS 60335-2-40在230V下合規的有效證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.32 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances: Particular requirements for heat pumps, air-conditioners and dehumidifiers
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory for domestic-market heat pumps and AC units
GB 4343.1 — EMC standard for household appliances

gap.en: SANS 60335-2-40 testing at 230 V / 50 Hz (not 220 V) is required to support the NRCS LOA. CCC evidence under GB 4706.32 at 220 V is not accepted by NRCS. Additionally, South Africa's load-shedding environment creates repeated start-stop cycling, voltage sag, and transient overvoltage conditions that may stress components beyond the scope of standard steady-state safety testing — exporters should consider whether product design includes protection for these conditions. ICASA type-approval is separately required for any wireless-enabled (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee) control features in the unit.
gap.zh: 支持NRCS LOA须在230V/50Hz（而非220V）条件下进行SANS 60335-2-40测试。NRCS不接受GB 4706.32在220V下的CCC证据。此外，南非停电轮供环境会导致反复启停循环、电压骤降和瞬态过电压工况，可能使零部件承受超出标准稳态安全测试范围的应力——出口商应评估产品设计是否包含针对上述工况的保护措施。具备无线功能（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee）控制功能的机型还须单独取得ICASA型式认证。
gap.zht: 支持NRCS LOA須在230V/50Hz（而非220V）條件下進行SANS 60335-2-40測試。NRCS不接受GB 4706.32在220V下的CCC證據。此外，南非停電輪供環境會導致反覆啟停循環、電壓驟降和瞬態過電壓工況，可能使零部件承受超出標準穩態安全測試範圍的應力——出口商應評估產品設計是否包含針對上述工況的保護措施。具備無線功能（Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee）控制功能的機型還須單獨取得ICASA型式認證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SANS 60335-2-40 conformance required as part of NRCS LOA under VC 8055; tested at South African grid conditions (230 V / 50 Hz)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese domestic-market products under GB 4706.32 and CCC; not equivalent to SANS 60335-2-40 at 230 V

source.publisher: National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications (NRCS), South Africa

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — SANS 60335-2-40 testing at 230 V / 50 Hz is required for the NRCS LOA; Chinese CCC/GB 4706.32 evidence at 220 V is not accepted. Load-shedding voltage stress validation and ICASA type-approval for wireless features are additional South Africa-specific obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——NRCS LOA要求在230V/50Hz下进行SANS 60335-2-40测试；中国在220V下的CCC/GB 4706.32证据不被接受。停电轮供电压应力验证及无线功能的ICASA型式认证是南非特有的附加义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——NRCS LOA要求在230V/50Hz下進行SANS 60335-2-40測試；中國在220V下的CCC/GB 4706.32證據不被接受。停電輪供電壓應力驗證及無線功能的ICASA型式認證是南非特有的附加義務。
